'''Madd Markos''' was a space [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]. He was seen in the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], attacking other spacecraft in his [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]].

==Appearances==
